Aapki Sehat Ka Sawal — Hum Yahan Hain

Aur madad chahiye?

Hamari 24/7 support team aapki madad ke liye tayyar hai۔

WhatsApp Email Us

Aam Sawalat

Ilaaj AI kya hai aur yeh kaise kaam karta hai?

Ilaaj AI Pakistan ka pehla AI-powered digital health platform hai. Aap apne symptoms bataen, AI assess karta hai, aur PMDC-verified doctor verify karta hai. Bilkul muft, 24/7 available.

Kya yeh service poore Pakistan mein available hai?

Haan — digital consultation aur AI diagnostics poore mulk mein available hain. Medicine delivery aur lab tests Karachi, Lahore, Islamabad aur Faisalabad mein operate karte hain.

Ilaaj AI kitna affordable hai?

AI consultation aur doctor verification bilkul free hain. Medicines ya lab tests sirf aap ke choose karne par pay karte hain. Koi hidden charges nahi, koi consultation fee nahi.

Privacy & Data

Kya mera medical data secure hai?

Haan. Hum bank-grade AES-256 encryption use karte hain, HIPAA principles follow karte hain. Aapki medical history sirf aap aur jo doctor aap choose karein unhe accessible hai.

Meri diagnostic results kaun dekh sakta hai?

Sirf aap. Agar aap consultation book karte hain, assigned PMDC-verified doctor temporarily aapki health history access karta hai accurate second opinion ke liye.

Kya main sensitive health topics ke liye use kar sakta hoon?

Bilkul. Aap anonymously chat kar sakte hain — bina naam ya phone number reveal kiye. Private concerns ke liye ideal, clinic jane se pehle.

Medical & Doctors

Doctor verification kaise hoti hai?

Har doctor PMDC registry ke against verify hota hai — license number, specialty, aur active practicing status confirm hota hai kisi bhi case review se pehle.

Main kis language mein chat kar sakta hoon?

English, Urdu (Nastaleeq), aur Roman Urdu. AI automatically aapki language detect karta hai aur usi mein reply karta hai. Mix karna bhi perfectly kaam karta hai.

Family members kaise add karein?

Chat sidebar se 'Add family member' tap karein, naam, umar aur relationship enter karein. Har member ka apna thread aur medical history hoga aapke account mein.

Prescription & Delivery

Prescription approval mein kitna time lagta hai?

Typically 15–30 minute, often faster. PMDC doctor se approve hone ke baad prescription downloadable PDF ke roop mein aapke chat thread mein aa jaata hai.

Emergency mein kya karein?

Ilaaj AI emergency services ka replacement nahi hai. Life-threatening symptoms ke liye 1122 call karein ya nearest emergency room jayen — foran.

500k+ Patients Ka Bharosa

Pakistani demographic ke liye accurate AI — diverse medical data par trained algorithms.

Doctor Portal

Kya aap healthcare professional hain? Pakistan ke fastest-growing digital clinic mein shamil hon.

Partner With Us

Mobile App

Apni sehat manage karein — instant alerts aur health tracking ke saath.

Ilaaj AI

Pakistan's first AI-powered health platform. Chat about your symptoms in any language, get AI triage, and receive doctor-verified prescriptions — affordable and accessible, 24/7.

Ilaaj AI is for general health consultations and non-emergency medical guidance. For emergencies, call 1122 (Rescue) or visit the nearest hospital.
